item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: We are back on 27 July.

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Classic butter chicken in a spiced tomato sauce with warm spices and browned butter, served with rice, raita and mango chutney. And if you dare: a little extra chilli. (6+11+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Butter tofu in a spiced tomato sauce with warm spices and browned butter, served with rice, raita and mango chutney. (6+11+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: We look forward to welcoming you back on 27 July. Summer closure Grab&Go Grab&Go is still available in the fridge as usual. Take-away

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Sweet and sour chicken and broccoli stir fry with vegetables on jasmine rice, topped with sesame and Thai basil. Served with chilli sauce, stir fry sauce and Asian cucumber salad. (1+7+8+13+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Sweet and sour tofu and broccoli stir fry with vegetables on jasmine rice, topped with sesame and Thai basil. Served with chilli sauce, stir fry sauce and Asian cucumber salad. (1+7+8+13+15)
